entries.post_title: State control blocks India’s progress and exploits its people: C Rajagopalachari
entries.content_preview:
The Swatantra Party wants the removal of the permit raj, which sits heavily over national production and trade, Rajagopalachari wrote in 1963.

| C Rajagopalachari

entries.post_title: Russian-style socialism dominated Nehru’s imagination. It was disastrous
entries.content_preview:
It is necessary to break the spell of socialist dogma on the imagination of those attracted by its Utopia as the only scientific way of progress, wrote MA Venkatarao in 1963.

| MA Venkatarao

https://theprint.in/opinion/indian-liberals-matter/russian-socialism-nehru-imagination/2742456/

entries.post_title: Was India’s public sector born out of European envy?
entries.content_preview:
For all its obvious blemishes, capitalism alone holds out the most creative and dynamic force that any civilization has ever discovered, wrote BP Godrej in 1980.

| BP Godrej
